overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a robed character exploring dimly lit stone corridors and staircases in a gothic castle, eventually entering a large potions classroom filled with wooden tables, cauldrons, and magical equipment. The atmospheric lighting comes from hanging lanterns and glowing braziers, creating a warm, mysterious ambiance.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle corridor with red carpet leading to stone staircase

events.description: character begins ascending the stone staircase
reaches top of stairs and enters upper corridor with stone columns

agents.ego_description: walking across a red carpeted floor and climbing a wide stone staircase

entered.detail: ornate red carpet with gold patterns covering the floor
wide stone staircase with worn steps leading upward
portrait in a gilded frame hanging on the stone wall
dark wooden bench against the corridor wall
gothic stone arch marking the transition to the upper level
iron lantern with warm yellow glow suspended from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a stone corridor with a red carpet, where the character walks toward and begins ascending a wide stone staircase. Warm lantern light illuminates the gothic stone walls and a framed portrait as the character climbs to the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: tight spiral stone staircase with curving walls

events.description: enters narrow spiral staircase with tightly curving stone walls

agents.ego_description: climbing a steep spiral staircase with stone walls curving closely on both sides

entered.detail: narrow winding staircase with steep stone steps spiraling upward
smooth curved stone walls forming the tight spiral enclosure
wall-mounted iron lanterns providing warm light along the ascent

segments.scene_description: The character enters and climbs a narrow spiral stone staircase with tightly curving walls. Wall-mounted lanterns cast dramatic shadows on the smooth stone as the character ascends the steep steps in a continuous upward spiral.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper corridor with suits of armor leading to classroom entrance

events.description: exits spiral staircase into straight corridor with stone columns
passes through large wooden door into the potions classroom

agents.ego_description: walking through a corridor lined with armor suits and opening a large wooden door to enter the classroom

entered.detail: straight corridor with high ceilings and stone flag flooring
full suit of medieval armor standing against the wall
large dark wooden door with iron studs marking the classroom entry
thick cylindrical stone columns supporting the corridor ceiling

segments.scene_description: Exiting the spiral staircase, the character proceeds through a straight stone corridor lined with suits of armor and stone columns. The character approaches and opens a large wooden door, transitioning into a much larger space.

scene_state.functional_zone: large potions classroom with vaulted ceilings and worktables

events.description: enters large vaulted classroom filled with potion tables and equipment
turns slightly to navigate between wooden tables while crossing the room

agents.ego_description: walking between wooden tables examining various potion cauldrons and magical equipment while crossing the large classroom

entered.detail: high gothic vaulted ceiling with ribbed stone arches
long wooden worktables arranged in rows throughout the classroom
black iron cauldrons sitting on tables some with glowing contents
large pointed stone arches supporting the classroom walls
lanterns and candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination
glass vials, bottles, and alchemical apparatus on the tables
wooden boards with potion recipes and instructions
large wooden door at the far end of the classroom

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast potions classroom with high vaulted ceilings and floating lanterns. Walking between rows of wooden tables laden with iron cauldrons, glass vials, and magical equipment, the character explores the warm-lit space while approaching the far exit door. The room features gothic stone arches and instruction boards along the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a series of claustrophobic gothic corridors that eventually opens into a vast, atmospheric classroom. It begins in a stone hallway with a red carpet, following the character as they ascend a wide staircase illuminated by warm lanterns and framed portraits. The path then tightens as the camera spirals upward through a narrow stone staircase where wall-mounted lights cast dramatic shadows against the curving walls. Upon exiting the spiral, the scene shifts back to a straight corridor lined with suits of armor and stone columns before the character opens a heavy wooden door. The space finally expands into a grand potions classroom with high vaulted ceilings and floating lanterns, moving past rows of iron cauldrons and glass vials toward a distant exit.
